tracking.basis: No advertising SDK, data broker sharing, targeted advertising, or linkage to third-party data is represented. Owner must confirm production systems and contracts.

app_review_demonstration.notes: The disclosed demonstration route uses bundled fictional content, simulated coordinates, and in-memory progress. It requires normal sign-in, a fresh Supabase getUser entitlement check, and database-time RPC authorization on every entry, but does not add raw GPS collection, analytics, feedback, score, quest API, Supabase gameplay mutation, notification, photo-storage, history, visited, collections, settings, or install-ID writes.

data_types.notes: Current coordinates are query parameters for quest generation. Live breadcrumb route is represented as local-only. Linked is the conservative submission draft pending production IP-log, processor, and signed-in-correlation review.
Display name and avatar are visible in friends/leaderboards.
Friend invite deep links contain the account UUID.

Random per-install ID, not IDFA. Sent with optional analytics, feedback, and score sink. Linked is the conservative submission draft because account and install can coexist on one device; change only with production evidence.

data_types.choice: Future optional events can be disabled in Settings > Privacy & legal.

data_types.notes: Points/streak/profile and signed-in shared-hunt result. Routes, photos, visited places and full local quest history are not represented as uploads.

Optional feedback text, rating, stop flag/context with install ID. Structured content-failure reports contain only reason, curated place/content-version IDs, queue fields, and a server request ID; no coordinates, route, media, clue/answer, contact/network/account/install identifier, or free-form field. Linked follows the conservative Device ID treatment pending production evidence.
Not an App Store 'collected' data type in the represented build because the app does not transmit it off-device. Re-evaluate if photo verification/upload is implemented.

local_only_data: Local score, streak and personal bests
processors_to_confirm: Render or actual DayQuest API host
